name: onnxruntime-web
description: Install-size stub. @huggingface/transformers hard-depends on onnxruntime-web (129 MB), but the Node runtime only ever executes onnxruntime-node — the web backend is pure dead disk on a server install. Wired via pnpm.overrides in the workspace root. If anything ever actually imports this in a Node process, the loud throw below is the correct outcome.
